examples: By lunchtime, Germany's Dax index and France's Cac 40 were both up more than 3%.
At close on Monday London's FTSE 100 was up 1.08% and the Cac 40 in Paris by 1.14%.
France's CAC 40 rose 5.3%, while Germany's Dax gained 6% and Japan's Nikkei gained 4.4%.
Germany's DAX index rose 0.9% to 7144.45, while France's CAC-40 index finished 0.4% higher at 3580.21.
London's FTSE 100 index retreated 1.9%, Frankfurt's DAX tumbled 2.7% and Paris's CAC-40 fell 2.5%.
